title: psacalium latilobum
intro: Psacalium latilobum is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Mexico. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Psacalium latilobum include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Psacalium latilobum is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots are also dried and used as a herbal supplement.
